nasb.text: But now he has died; why should I fast? Can I bring him back again? I will go to him, but he will not return to me.”

esv.text: But now he is dead. Why should I fast? Can I bring him back again? I shall go to him, but he will not return to me.”

cnv.text: 現在他死了，我為甚麼還要禁食呢？我還能使他回來嗎？我要到他那裡去，他卻不能回到我這裡來。”

ccb.text: 但现在他既然死了，我禁食又有什么用呢？能让他起死回生吗？我必去他那里，他却不能返回这里了。”
